data.name: Media Player Controller Using Hand Gestures
data.description: Control your media player using hand gestures through a webcam without touching the keyboard or mouse. Uses OpenCV, MediaPipe, PyAutoGUI, and Python to detect finger movements and perform media operations (Play, Pause, Next, Prev, Volume).

data.name: Employee Management System
data.description: A Java-based web application for managing employee records efficiently. Built using JSP, Servlets, JDBC, and MySQL with a simple and responsive interface to add, update, delete, and search records.
